#  View Specification Area (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You can only enable 'Specifications by Area' using the Procore Web app. Once you enable or disable it, your Procore Android Mobile app will automatically sync.
    * To see the **Areas** button, you will need to have 'Specifications by Area' configured on your Procore account. See[ Enable or Disable Specification Areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-specification-areas) and [Add Specification Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/add-a-specification-area).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap to select a specification area from the left pane.  
_Note:_ This action will show only specifications associated with the selected area.


## See Also
  * [Download Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/download-specifications-android)
  * [What are the computer and mobile hardware requirements for Procore Models?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-computer-and-mobile-hardware-requirements-for-procore-models)
  * [View Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/view-specifications-android)
title: View Specification Area (Android)
description: How to view multiple specification areas in the Specifications tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
